final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster reimagining a classic 大话西游 scene in 90s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: needs a 90s 港片 film aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include foreground couple embracing against a city wall, two figures standing in the distant background
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 sharing a kiss against a city wall (foreground), 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing in the distance (background)
Scene/backdrop: must include a dramatic city wall setting evoking the world of 大话西游
Lighting/mood: needs a cinematic, emotionally charged 90s Hong Kong film atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, faded, filmic direction evoking 90s 港片 color grading — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include film grain throughout
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
